step_rationale: Regulates platelet production and activation in coronary thrombosis.
mechanism: MPL signaling modulates platelet mass and functional state, influencing thrombotic response at coronary lesion.

references.title: Alterations in platelet proteome signature and impaired platelet integrin αβactivation in patients with COVID-19.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
